tagline: An elegant restaurant, bar, and event venue in Burbank.

hero.heading: Where the night becomes a memory.
hero.subheading: A restaurant, bar, and lounge designed to host the moments worth remembering — birthdays, anniversaries, after-work drinks, and engagements.

about.heading: 91 reviews. 4.4 stars. Burbank's hidden event venue.
paragraphs: Bouvardia is more than a restaurant — it's a setting. Soft lighting, leather banquettes, and a kitchen and bar that can hold their own at a dinner party or a 40-person celebration.
Walk in any evening for cocktails and a small plate, or book the whole space for the kind of night you want photos of.

services.title: Dinner Service
services.description: Seasonal modern American with Mediterranean accents. Open Tuesday–Sunday from 11 AM.

services.title: Cocktail Lounge
services.description: A bartender-led cocktail menu, natural wines, and curated spirits. Quiet enough to talk in.

services.title: Private Events
services.description: Buyout, semi-private, and back-room options for 12 to 80 guests. Custom menus available.

services.title: Weddings & Showers
services.description: Bridal showers, rehearsal dinners, intimate weddings. We handle floral, AV, and tableware.

services.title: Corporate Dinners
services.description: Team offsites, holiday parties, client entertainment. Bring the laptops if you need to.

services.title: Catering Off-Site
services.description: Off-premise catering for offices, weddings, and home dinners. Drop-off or full service.

reviews.name: Rachel B.
reviews.text: Hosted my mom's 60th here. Every detail was handled — they even had her favorite flowers on the table. Unforgettable.

reviews.name: Mark T.
reviews.text: Date night spot. Beautiful room, real cocktails, food that's actually good. Burbank's best-kept secret.

reviews.name: Sofia G.
reviews.text: Did our wedding rehearsal here. Service was warm, the room felt like a film set. Highly recommend.

contact.mapEmbedQuery: Bouvardia Venues, 137 S Glenoaks Blvd, Burbank, CA

seo.title: Bouvardia Venues — Restaurant, Bar & Event Venue in Burbank, CA
seo.description: An elegant restaurant, bar, and private event venue in Burbank. Weddings, corporate dinners, birthdays, and cocktail service nightly.
